title: The Spears of Rebuild
wikitext:
[]: The Spears of Rebuild             Quote Post by WrierGold » Sun Sep 12, 2021 6:59 pm So let's talk the spears (Spoilers obviously). I believe they mentioned in the new movie that there were 6 spears? And all of them must've been retrieved after Second impact, from the Adams, since if Lilith would've had it's own spear it would've prevented the life on earth to flourish after First impact. So therefore all the spears must've been retrieved from the Adams. Four spears for the four Adams we see in the first movies: From the flashback to Second Impact in 1.0. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: The Spears of Rebuild             Quote Post by Konja7 » Sun Sep 12, 2021 7:33 pm I don't think the Spear of Cassius changed during the Third Impact. The Spear of Cassius being transformed in Spear of Longinus seems to happen later. We should consider that is pretty likely the Spear of Cassius and the Spear of Longinus were used to stop the Third Impact. That's why these are impaled in Lilith's body (the epicenter of the Third Impact). Also, we should consider that the Hope by Cassius doesn't seem to be exactly a good thing. The humans were given two options. They could be destroyed by the Angels or they destroy the Angels and take their place (as creatures with Fruit of Life but without Fruit of Knowledge). The despair of Longinus seems to represent the first option, while the hope of Cassius seems to represent the second option.

[]: Re: The Spears of Rebuild             Quote Post by WrierGold » Sun Sep 12, 2021 8:05 pm Konja7 wrote: I don't think the Spear of Cassius changed during the Third Impact. The humans were given two options. They could be destroyed by the Angels or they destroy the Angels and take their place (as creatures with Fruit of Life but without Fruit of Knowledge). The despair of Longinus seems to represent the first option, while the hope of Cassius seems to represent the second option.
